chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 502 - قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «مَنْ عَزَّى حَزِيناً كُسِيَ فِي اَلْمَوْقِفِ حُلَّةً يُحَبَّرُ بِهَا.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.502 - The Messenger of Allah (sw) said:
"Whoever consoles a grieving person will be clothed in a robe of honor on the Day of Standing (the Day of Judgment), which will bring them joy (and honor)."
